title: *: move pkg main into cmd/skopeo/

comments.body: I thought the point was to separate the library pieces (~ the `types.Image*` implementations) from the CLI; so why move _everything_ to `cmd/skopeo`?
@mtrmac this is just another piece of moving the libraries pieces to their own subdirs - this justs move them there for now, then docker_\* will be moved back to the root dir under subdirs
To me that’s a counterintuitive way to go about it, but it does work, of course. Merging.
